name: The Slow Verdict
specialty: Their expertise lies in tracking and neutralizing fire-based threats, a skill honed through years of experience and a shared heritage.

members.name: Kaelen Firewhisper
members.note: His scarred face is a testament to the fires he's survived, and his cold demeanor often masks a deep empathy.

members.name: Ashara Blazechaser
members.note: Her piercing green eyes glow with an eerie light when she uses her unique fire-sensing ability.

members.name: Zephyr Ashstorm
members.note: With his wings folded behind him, he appears more human than demon, but the scent of smoke always lingers.

visual: They wear dark, ash-colored robes emblazoned with the symbol of the Wardens of Ash. Their faces are masked, save for Zephyr, who carries himself with a stoic confidence. A faint smell of smoke follows them wherever they go.
reputation_note: Whispers of a fearsome crew who can extinguish the fiercest flames and leave their mark on those who threaten the Undercity.
